summary: Finalize current step and persist step completion state
done: State advanced (or task complete) after finalization

placeholders.verification: short description of how step was verified (from /review output)
placeholders.changedFiles: optional array of changed file paths (from FileOpsRES.changedFiles)
placeholders.stepIndex: step number for commit message (prefer 1-based; if state uses 0-based, use stepIndex+1)
placeholders.stepTitle: current step title for commit message
